com.irurueta.geometry.AffineTransformation2D

Bug Category Details Line Priority
com.irurueta.geometry.AffineTransformation2D.getTranslation() may expose internal representation by returning AffineTransformation2D.translation MALICIOUS_CODE EI_EXPOSE_REP 537 Medium
new com.irurueta.geometry.AffineTransformation2D(double, Rotation2D, double[]) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into AffineTransformation2D.translation MALICIOUS_CODE EI_EXPOSE_REP2 277 Medium
new com.irurueta.geometry.AffineTransformation2D(double, double[]) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into AffineTransformation2D.translation MALICIOUS_CODE EI_EXPOSE_REP2 225 Medium

com.irurueta.geometry.AffineTransformation2D.setTranslation(double[]) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into AffineTransformation2D.translation MALICIOUS_CODE EI_EXPOSE_REP2 553 Medium
